intro: I'm Willian, a web developer with practical training in Web & WebApp Development at Syntax Institut.
I completed key modules, the course certificate, and already passed the Junior Web Developer IHK exam.
My main focus is frontend with React and Next.js, supported by practical experience with APIs, authentication, and backend.

about.title: About me
about.description: I'm a web developer with a strong focus on frontend development and UX. During my Web & WebApp Developer training at Syntax Institut, I completed important modules, the course certificate, and already passed the Junior Web Developer IHK exam. I work on React and Next.js projects with clear architecture, clean styling, understandable UI flows, and backend integration. Projects like ContainerHub, Heilpraktiker-Bleialf, and the Pokémon WebApp help me practice UI work, APIs, authentication, and data flows in real scenarios.

workStyle.description: I care about clear layouts, responsive behavior, and understandable interactions.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Compact descriptions focused on technology, responsibilities, and learning goals.

list.title: Heilpraktiker-Bleialf
list.description: Transformed a static clinic website into a fullstack application with authentication, a health-check recommendation engine, and an appointment system — creating a complete patient acquisition pipeline.
highlights: Role-based auth (USER/ADMIN/SUPERADMIN) with JWT + cookie sessions and value-gated results
Recommendation engine: quiz → treatment → doctor + appointment management with PENDING/CONFIRMED/CANCELED states

list.title: Lego Set Explorer
list.description: Full-stack LEGO set explorer with search, filters, authentication, personal collections, and stats dashboard.
highlights: Filter by theme, year, and piece count
Session-based auth with personal collections and stats

list.title: ContainerHub
list.description: Container rental platform with React, Tailwind, and Strapi API (draft/active).

list.title: Pokedex-Web
list.description: API-based app focused on UI components, state, and responsive layout.

list.title: Portfolio
list.description: This portfolio — built with React, Vite, Tailwind, multilingual support, and automated GitHub Pages deploy.
